scenarios: desktop relationship explorer, equivalent views, evidence, rights, and URL state
Art landing and 1366-wide constellation remain complete without overflow
About, rights, and accessibility routes expose their public controls
390px low-bandwidth explorer preserves focus and URL state
forced colors, reduced motion, and unavailable WebGL keep the same relationship tasks

initial_failure.scenario: desktop relationship explorer, equivalent views, evidence, rights, and URL state
initial_failure.cause: relationship shard remained in the on-demand loading state until the 30 second total test timeout
initial_failure.disposition: only the failed scenario was rerun with the original timeout and assertions; it passed in 14.9 seconds

screenshot_disposition: online smoke screenshots were written to an operating-system temporary directory; the 12 formal phase screenshots remain the committed visual evidence
